name: WorkflowEventHistory
description: Developer-facing 'Workflow Event History' page for the qontinui-web app. Streams the recent workflow/runner events the web app has received, with a free-text filter (by event name or source) and an event table. Re-authored against the SPEC_CI (ci-bot) account in Visual mode: ci-bot is a non-superuser with no qontinui-runner reachable, so the page renders its page header, the always-present filter input, and the 'Runner not reachable' notice instead of the queue/circuit-breaker widgets, subscriptions badge, events-count, or the four-column event table (all of which require a live runner feeding /inngest/* and are therefore absent). Asserts only the structural anchors that render with no runner; the table, badges, and widgets are intentionally not asserted because they are data/runner-driven and never mount in this account's state.

states.name: Page header
states.description: Top-of-page heading. Always rendered regardless of runner availability or event data.

assertions.description: h1 'Workflow Event History' heading anchors the page.

states.name: Event filter bar
states.description: Free-text filter input (matches on event name or source). Rendered unconditionally above the content area, independent of whether any events have arrived.

assertions.description: Filter input ('Filter by event name or source...') is present.

states.name: Runner-offline notice
states.description: With no qontinui-runner reachable (the SPEC_CI account's state), the page surfaces the runner-not-reachable notice instead of the event table. Asserts the notice container structurally; the exact host/port text is environment-driven and not asserted.

assertions.description: Runner-not-reachable notice is mounted when the runner feed is unavailable.
